title: kentiopsis oliviformis
intro: Kentiopsis oliviformis, a species of flowering plant in the family Diapensiaceae, is native to New Caledonia and is also known as the Caledonian Kentiopsis. The leaves and roots of the plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Kentiopsis oliviformis include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and potentially treating various infections. Traditional herbal preparations of the plant include infusions and decoctions, which can be used to make teas or other medicinal remedies.
